name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate utility bill summaries instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in compiling and summarizing utility bill data for multiple properties.
features: Data entry for utility bill details

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and summarization of utility bills.
must_have_features: Data entry for utility bill details
